title: stelis rotunda
intro: Stelis rotunda, also known as the Stelis plant, is a type of orchid native to Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Stelis rotunda include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are commonly used in folk medicine to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
